title: Reverse Linked List
hints: Consider how you would reverse the links between just two adjacent nodes. How can you extend this pairwise operation to the entire list?
Use three pointers: one for the previous node, one for the current node, and one for the next node. Update them as you traverse.
The critical insight is saving the next node before reversing the current link, otherwise the rest of the list is lost. Handle the empty list case.
